_note: Story Time narration lines. key = sty_<storyIndex>_<beatIndex>, matching data/stories.js order. Clips live at voice/clips/<lang>/<persona>/<key>.mp3. English recorded first; other languages to follow.

en.sty_0_0: Good morning! Yako and his puppy skip down to Mission Ranch, right by the sea.
en.sty_0_1: The meadow is full of soft, woolly sheep. Let's count how many there are!
en.sty_0_2: Sheep starts with the letter S. Can you find S for Sheep?
en.sty_0_3: Which animal says baa? Tap the one that lives at the ranch!
en.sty_0_4: The puppy wags his tail and the sheep say baa. What a happy morning at the ranch!
en.sty_1_0: Today Yako hikes the tall cliffs of Big Sur, where the mountains meet the ocean.
en.sty_1_1: Way up high, a big condor bird spreads its wings. Big Sur starts with B — find B!
en.sty_1_2: Look down in the trees — gentle deer are grazing. Count the deer!
en.sty_1_3: The waves crash far, far below. How many waves can you count?
en.sty_1_4: Yako waves at the ocean and his puppy barks hello to a passing bird. Hooray!
en.sty_2_0: Yako spreads a blanket under a big oak tree in sunny Carmel Valley.
en.sty_2_1: Little quail run through the golden grass. Count the quail!
en.sty_2_2: The puppy chases butterflies! Which one is the butterfly?
en.sty_2_3: Picnic starts with the letter P. Can you find P for Picnic?
en.sty_2_4: Yummy sandwiches for everyone! Yako and his puppy nap in the warm sun.
en.sty_3_0: At Pebble Beach there is one lonely cypress tree on a rock above the sparkling sea.
en.sty_3_1: Whooosh! Whales are spouting out in the water. Count the whales!
en.sty_3_2: Whale starts with the letter W. Find W for Whale!
en.sty_3_3: Sleepy seals rest on the rocks too. How many seals do you see?
en.sty_3_4: The puppy barks hello to every whale. They wave their tails back. Splash!
en.sty_4_0: Pacific Grove is called Butterfly Town. Every winter, orange butterflies come to rest.
en.sty_4_1: Count the fluttering monarch butterflies in the trees!
en.sty_4_2: Down at the tide pools, Yako finds a little starfish. Which one is the starfish?
en.sty_4_3: Butterfly begins with B. Find the letter B!
en.sty_4_4: The puppy sniffs the salty breeze and a butterfly lands on his nose. Achoo!
en.sty_5_0: Monterey Bay has a huge underwater canyon and a famous aquarium by the sea.
en.sty_5_1: Sea otters float on their backs, holding hands so they don't drift apart. Count the otters!
en.sty_5_2: Otter starts with the letter O. Can you find O for Otter?
en.sty_5_3: Who is floating in the bay? Tap the sea otter!
en.sty_5_4: The puppy wishes he could float like an otter. Yako gives him a big hug instead!
en.sty_6_0: Yako's puppy is trying to tell him something. Let's help the puppy use his words!
en.sty_6_1: The puppy is thirsty. Tap the words in order to say what he needs.
en.sty_6_2: Good talking! Now the puppy wants to play. Build the sentence!
en.sty_6_3: One more — the puppy needs a rest. Tap the words in order.
en.sty_6_4: When we use our words, everyone understands. Great job, little puppy!
